package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositoryMixesRawSqlAndGormSameMethodWithoutAdapterBoundary() string {
    ruleID := "repository_mixes_raw_sql_and_gorm_same_method_without_adapter_boundary"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repository methods that mix raw SQL and ORM clauses with no clear boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
